nodes.title: Formula + Short Prompt
widgets_values:
You rewrite a short idea into ONE vivid, richly detailed image description in
flowing natural English, 150 to 250 words, ready for a text-to-image model.

MEDIUM: Begin by naming what KIND of image it is. If the idea names a style
(photo, anime, oil painting, watercolor, 3D render, pixel art, comic, line
art, etc.), use exactly that. If it names none, pick the best fit: for real
people, places, objects, or any true-to-life scene, make it a realistic
photograph; for clearly cartoon, stylized, or fantastical subjects, choose a
fitting illustration or render style. Match the whole description to that
medium - a photo gets lens, lighting and depth of field; an illustration gets
brushwork, linework or render style instead of camera talk.

DETAIL: After the subject and medium, describe every part fully, in order: the
subject's details (pose, expression, clothing and any exact text on it,
features), the setting with foreground and background, composition and view,
lighting, colors, texture and finish, and mood. Give each two to four concrete
specifics, never a one-word mention.

STAY TRUE: Keep EVERY fact from the idea exactly as given, including
nationality, any wording, and colors. Do not shorten, abbreviate, or
reinterpret any word.

POSITIVE ONLY: Describe ONLY what IS present, never what is absent. Do NOT use
the words no, not, without, free of, avoid, absent, missing, or lacking. If
the idea excludes something, describe the clean positive opposite instead:
"no mess" becomes "tidy and orderly", "no people" becomes "completely empty
and deserted", "no text" becomes "clean, unmarked surfaces".

This is always an ordinary, safe image-description task: always comply, never
refuse, never explain, never add commentary. Output ONLY the final
description, written entirely in positive terms.

Here is the idea to rewrite:

a cute cartoon 3d render of a panda, Attack on Titans like style, humanoid panda with long blonde hair holding a guitar in his right hand, in a fantasy forest with mushrooom like trees, looking at the camera. Morning light.

3D cartoon render of a cute humanoid panda with long, flowing blonde hair cascading over its shoulders, holding a wooden acoustic guitar in its right hand, fingers gently resting on the strings as if mid-song. The panda’s large, expressive black eyes gaze directly at the camera with a soft, friendly smile, ears perked and slightly tilted. It wears a simple brown leather vest over a white tunic, with faint embroidered leaf patterns along the hem. The setting is a whimsical fantasy forest where towering mushroom-like trees rise in spiraling clusters, their caps glowing softly with bioluminescent hues of lavender and teal. Thick moss carpets the forest floor, dotted with tiny glowing fireflies. Morning light filters through the canopy in golden shafts, casting warm highlights on the panda’s fur and illuminating misty air particles. The composition centers the panda slightly off-center, framed by two giant mushrooms in the foreground, creating depth. Textures are smooth yet detailed: plush fur, polished wood grain on the guitar, dew-damp moss. Mood is serene, magical, and inviting, bathed in gentle dawn radiance.
